channel.title: Government Secrecy on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Government Secrecy on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Citizens Against UFO Secrecy
item.description:
Founded in 1977, Citizens Against UFO Secrecy (CAUS) was a non-profit organization that utilized the Freedom of Information Act to advocate for the public release of classified government documents concerning UFOs. Under the leadership of attorney Peter Gersten, the group successfully secured over 900 documents from the CIA in 1979 but faced legal setbacks in subsequent attempts to obtain files from the National Security Agency and state officials. As of 2023, the organization is listed as inactive with its non-profit status revoked.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Citizens_Against_UFO_Secrecy
